name: Flipkart Axis Bank Super Elite Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Flipkart Axis Bank Super Elite Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on annual spends greater than Rs 2 lakh, excluding rent and wallet load transactions
additionalBenefits: Additional 12 SuperCoins per Rs 100 spent on Flipkart for Plus members
Additional 6 SuperCoins per Rs 100 spent on Flipkart for non-Plus members
2 SuperCoins per Rs 100 on other eligible spends
2 months trial membership of YouTube Premium
3 months trial subscription of Gaana Plus
Extra Rs 500 off on Myntra select styles on maximum 3 transactions above Rs 2,999
15% off on domestic flight booking via Flipkart Flights, capped at Rs 1,500
Flat 30% off on first medicine order from Flipkart Health

salaried: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be between 18 and 70 years and resident of India
